name: Red Pesto Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and chop the sun-dried tomatoes.
2. In a food processor, combine the chopped sun-dried tomatoes with basil leaves and garlic.
3. Pulse until the mixture is coarsely chopped.
4. Add Romano cheese, pine nuts, and 0.25 cup of olive oil to the food processor.
5. Continue pulsing until all ingredients are well combined.
6. With the motor running, add the remaining olive oil, salt, and pepper.
7. Scrape down the sides of the processor bowl.
8. Pulse until everything is thoroughly mixed.
